## Summary

Describe the change in a few sentences.

## Untouched Areas

Confirm what was not changed, especially sensitive areas and unrelated runtime code.

## Self-Check

- [ ] The PR matches the issue scope only.
- [ ] Forbidden files were not modified.
- [ ] Allowed files were respected.
- [ ] Validation was run or the limitation was explained.
- [ ] The PR is ready for QA review.

## Validation

Describe what was run, what passed, and any limits.

## Risks

List any residual risks, especially around sensitive areas.

## Screenshots

If UI changed, attach screenshots or explain why none are needed.

## Human Review Notes

Call out anything Denis should focus on before approving.
